title: Knowledge Graph Schema
description: Defines valid entity and relationship types for the Personal RAG Database.

Person.description: Individual human entities (e.g., Ganesh, mentors, colleagues).

Technology.description: Programming languages, frameworks, databases, and tooling.

Project.description: Software, systems, or research projects built by Ganesh.

Certification.description: Official qualifications, courses, and certifications completed.

Role.description: Professional or leadership positions held by Ganesh.

Event.description: Hackathons, challenges, workshops, or academic milestones.

Location.description: Cities, states, countries, or remote locations.

relationships.description: Indicates a technology or skill was used to build a project, or a technology belongs to a skill domain.
Connects K. Ganesh Giridhar or a specific Role to an Organization where work took place.
Indicates K. Ganesh Giridhar built a specific Project.
Indicates K. Ganesh Giridhar possesses a specific Skill.
Indicates K. Ganesh Giridhar completed or achieved a Certification.
Indicates a Certification was issued by or learned from an Organization.
Indicates K. Ganesh Giridhar attended or studied at an educational institution.
Geographically tags an entity to a physical or remote Location.
Indicates K. Ganesh Giridhar participated in a hackathon, competition, or event.
